---
format: html
author: 
  - name: "SVA name "
    affiliations: "Swedish Veterinary Agency"
  - name: "FOHM name"
    affiliation: "Public Health Agency of Sweden"
---

# Comparative analysis {#sec-ca}

{{< include Comparison_of_antibiotics_sales_in_humans_and_veterinary_medicine.qmd >}}

{{< include Comp_of_amr_in_humans_and_veterinary_medicine.qmd >}}
